axioms: Laptop experienced stuttering around the end of the last session.
Keyboard stopped working simultaneously or sequentially.

tracks.A: Confirmed: Embedded Controller (EC) failure. ACPI Event 13 repeatedly logged. EC manages thermals and keyboard.
tracks.B: Confirmed: Hardware-level interrupt storm (ACPI trying to reach EC) caused stuttering. Downstream USB/Synaptics failed.
tracks.C: Synthesis: The EC hung. Keyboard died because it routes through EC. Stuttering caused by interrupt storm and fail-safe thermal throttling. Crash caused by EC locking up completely.
